summary: The user sought assistance with troubleshooting a connectivity issue between their Samsung QLED 4K TV and the StreamMax streaming service, which displayed an "Authentication Failed" error. They also mentioned setting up a temperature control device on February 10th and ordered cable organizers on January 28th, while expressing a desire to organize their digital life and set up a guest network on their new router acquired on January 15th.
facts: The user has a Samsung QLED 4K TV.
The user is experiencing an "Authentication Failed" error when trying to connect to the StreamMax streaming service.
The user set up a device to control their home's temperature from their phone on February 10th.
The user ordered cable organizers online on January 28th, but they have not yet arrived.
The user acquired a new router on January 15th.
The user experienced an incident on February 1st when their laptop would not turn on.
The user is considering setting up a guest network feature on their new router.
The user has checked their StreamMax account credentials and confirmed they are correct.
The user plans to update the StreamMax app to the latest version.
The user intends to back up their laptop files more regularly.
